what: Reload session context (loaded packages, prompt count)
why: Resume exactly where the user left off

output.console: Restored context summary with loaded packages and prompt count

success_handling.criteria: Session context is restored with loaded packages re-initialized and prompt count resumed from saved state

error_handling.criteria: One or more previously loaded packages cannot be reloaded (removed, corrupted, version mismatch)
error_handling.action: Skip failed packages, restore available context, log warning with failed package list

event.message: Some packages could not be reloaded: {failed_packages}

decisions.outcome: Warn user about missing packages, flow completes successfully
